category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dasht as a tool to search API docs offline in a terminal or browser.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dasht; source_facts.homepage is the official dasht site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dasht documentation site; source_facts.repo provides the official README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it searches API docs offline in terminal or browser; source_facts.executables lists dasht, docset, query, and server commands.
